# Lousy Agents

> Developer tooling for coding agent governance, observability, and least-privilege infrastructure.

- [Full documentation (single file)](/llms-full.txt)

## Projects
- agent-shell: Rust-based shell shim for agent observability and governance
- lousy-iam: Least-privilege IAM policy generator

- [Overview](/docs/readme.md)
- [init Command](/docs/init.md)
- [new Command](/docs/new.md)
- [lint Command](/docs/lint.md)
- [copilot-setup Command](/docs/copilot-setup.md)
- [MCP Server](/docs/mcp-server.md)
